acquisition method: Using data-dependent acquisition mode, full MS/MS scans...
alkylation reagent: modified by adding 10 μl 0.5 M iodoacetamide
collision energy: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation in the collision cell (normalized collision energy 28%)
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation in the collision cell
instrument: coupled via a nano-electrospray source to a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled via a nano-electrospray source to a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
